prompt: I need to simulate wheat yield for a region in Ethiopia (bbox: [37.0, 8.0, 38.0, 9.0]) from 2018 to 2020. I don't have any datacubes yet. Use spring wheat and planting date October 1. Download climate from CHIRPS and CHIRTS. For solar radiation, I don't have a CDS key so use NASA POWER instead. Output everything to E:/ethiopia_wheat.

assertions.text: uses_full_pipeline_mode: Config YAML contains mode: full_pipeline
nasa_power_for_rsds: Config uses nasa_power source for rsds variable
correct_date_range: Config has start_date 2018-01-01 and end_date 2020-12-31
wheat_crop: Config crop name is Wheat
no_spaces_in_working_path: working_path in config contains no spaces
